tests.name: t1
tests.prompt: Jag vill testa en ny scan-strategi utan att riskera produktionen.
assertions: Recommends building in a new file or module instead of editing app.py or scanner.py directly
Mentions building the smallest version that works first
Mentions testing the prototype in isolation
Mentions integrating behind a flag or in a separate page
Mentions showing the result to David or getting feedback

tests.name: t2
tests.prompt: Jag har en idé om en ny UI-komponent.
assertions: Recommends building it in a separate file or Streamlit page
Advises against touching production code until the prototype works
